sections.title: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — Introduction and Formula
sections.hindiTitle: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — परिचय और फॉर्मूला
sections.explanation: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary is an essential building block of English. Formula: Bird noun + verb (+ location/sound) | Subject + verb + astrology noun. Rules: Bird verbs: fly, sing, sit, swim, lay eggs — matched to the specific bird | 'national bird' and 'symbol of peace' are fixed descriptive phrases | Astrology terms: horoscope, zodiac sign, moon sign, prediction, fortune | 'check/read a horoscope' and 'come true' (for predictions) are common collocations
sections.formula: Bird noun + verb (+ location/sound) | Subject + verb + astrology noun

examples.hindi: तोता हरे रंग का होता है।
examples.english: The parrot is green in colour.
The sparrow is sitting on the roof.

examples.hindi: मोर भारत का राष्ट्रीय पक्षी है।
examples.english: The peacock is India's national bird.

examples.hindi: कौआ बहुत तेज आवाज करता है।
examples.english: The crow makes a very loud sound.
The pigeon is a symbol of peace.
The eagle flies very high.

sections.title: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — Daily Life Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — रोज़मर्रा के उपयोग
sections.explanation: Everyday sentences using Birds & Astrology Vocabulary for daily conversation.
sections.formula: Bird noun + verb (+ location/sound) | Subject + verb + astrology noun

examples.english: The owl stays awake at night.
The cuckoo sings sweetly.

examples.hindi: हंस झील में तैर रहा है।
examples.english: The swan is swimming in the lake.
The hen lays eggs.
She checked her horoscope.
My zodiac sign is Leo.

sections.title: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — Office & Professional Usage
sections.hindiTitle: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — ऑफिस और पेशेवर उपयोग
sections.explanation: Practice Birds & Astrology Vocabulary in professional and office contexts.
sections.formula: Bird noun + verb (+ location/sound) | Subject + verb + astrology noun

examples.hindi: आज रात आसमान में तारे साफ दिखे।
examples.english: The stars were clearly visible in the sky tonight.

examples.hindi: यह ग्रह पृथ्वी से बड़ा है।
examples.english: This planet is bigger than Earth.
The astrologer told the future.
His prediction came true.

sections.title: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — Negative and Question Forms
sections.hindiTitle: Birds & Astrology Vocabulary — नकारात्मक और प्रश्न रूप
sections.explanation: How to make negative sentences and questions using Birds & Astrology Vocabulary. Common mistakes are highlighted here.
sections.formula: Bird noun + verb (+ location/sound) | Subject + verb + astrology noun

examples.hindi: किस्मत सबके साथ अलग होती है।
examples.english: Fortune is different for everyone.
His moon sign is Cancer.
Birds wake up early in the morning.

examples.hindi: आकाश में कई पक्षी उड़ रहे हैं।
examples.english: Many birds are flying in the sky.
